results.rendered_html: karṇadhāra (karṇa + dhāra) m. Steuermann  AK. 1,2,3,12 .  TRIK. 3,3,27 .  H. 876 .  R. 2,52,75 .  SUŚR. 1,123,14 .  PRAB. 83,10 .  VID. 232  (Schiffsmann, Matrose).  BHĀG. P. 1,1,22 . 13,38 .  SĀH. D. 8,11 . Am Ende eines adj. comp. f. āḥ akarṇadhārā jaladhau viplaveteha nauriva  HIT. III, 2 . akarṇadhārā pṛthivī śūnyeva pratibhāti me . gate daśarathe svargaṃ rāme cāraṇyamāśrite ..  R. 2,88,17 . karṇadhāratā das Amt eines Steuermanns  KATHĀS. 26,8 .
